scripts.build: npm run build --prefix client && rm -rf public && cp -r client/dist public
scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix client && prisma generate --schema server/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.demo:ignite: npm run db:reset && npm start --prefix server
scripts.start:aura: npm start --prefix server & npm run dev --prefix client
scripts.aura-vault-backup: cp server/aura.db server/aura.db.bak && echo '>>> AURA_VAULT: Immutable Snapshot Created.'
scripts.aura-vault-restore: cp server/aura.db.bak server/aura.db && echo '>>> AURA_VAULT: Perfect State Restored.'
